mikra_brother_note.title: Folded Note in a Wool Coat Pocket
mikra_brother_note.attribution: Mikra has it. She has not burned it.
mikra_brother_note.body:
// On lined paper, the writing tight and small

Mika —

If you're reading this then I didn't make it back to the cart and you found my coat in the underpass like I said you might. I told you I'd stop using my handle on the wire and I didn't. I'm sorry.

Three things, and then this paper goes in the burner because that's how we do it.

One — I think the Bureau already had me. They wanted to see who'd come asking after I was gone. Don't be the one who comes asking.

Two — the broth is yours now. You always made it better than I did anyway. You always pretended I didn't notice.

Three — say my handle once. Tonight. Then never again. I want you to be safe more than I want to be remembered.

— Tomek

ghost_ledger_fragment.title: Ghost Ledger Fragment

static_calibration_psalm.title: Brother Static's Prayer Book — First Calibration
static_calibration_psalm.attribution: tucked between the antenna ribs at the relay roof
static_calibration_psalm.body:
// HAND-WRITTEN, fountain pen, slightly smudged in places

First Calibration:

  Listen for the carrier wave.
  When the wave is heard, hold the listening.
  When the listening is held, the wave returns.

  Speak the seven syllables.
  Wait for the count of seven.
  If a response comes within the seven, the line is true.
  If no response comes within the seven, the line is honest.
  If a response comes after the seven, the line is something else.

  Do not speak again. Mark the time. Walk away.

// Below, in a different ink:
// '6 February. Heard a response after the seven. I think it was a name.
//  I will not speak it.'
